metadata.description: godaudits: audit everything after anything. A single-command audit superskill emitting scored, evidence-backed audit reports with agent-executable remediation plans.

plugins.name: godaudits
plugins.description: Audit an existing codebase end to end in one command: 18 audit domains, evidence-backed findings at file:line, per-domain scores with risk caps, and a checkbox remediation plan any coding agent can execute.
